regulations.title: EU Packaging and Packaging Waste Regulation
regulations.summary: PE/EVOH bread bags at risk of Class C; PP bakery bags likely Class B; packaging LCA commissioned.

regulations.title: Verpackungsdurchführungsgesetz Amendment
regulations.summary: Article 12c fee differentiation; PE/EVOH laminates likely high-fee tier; PackML declaration required by June 2026.

regulations.title: Austrian EPR — ARA Scheme
regulations.summary: Vienna Pastries 78t/year places on AT market; ARA registration required; estimated EUR 16,840 annual contribution.

regulations.title: Lieferkettensorgfaltspflichtengesetz
regulations.summary: German employee count near 1,000 threshold; BAFA confirmation required; LkSG report may be due April 2026.
